title: Ship Trails for Sable
description: Compatibility bridge between Wakes mod and Sable or Aeronautics ships
body:
## WAKES FOR SABLE
This mod adds compatibility between [Sable](https://modrinth.com/project/T9PomCSv) and [Wakes Reforged](https://modrinth.com/project/E0SdeAoH) mod

## **-THIS MOD IS ARCHIVED | THE ORIGINAL CREATOR PUSHED AN UPDATE (1.3.0) THAT IMPLEMENTS WAKES FOR SABLE NATIVELY-**
##
_[FEATURING]_
- Water trails for physics objects
- Configurable settings for performance
- Distance based framerate for better performance


![Ship rotating](https://i.imgur.com/no9mSFy.gif)
